queries.pubmed_query: (precision livestock farming OR "smart farming" OR "livestock monitoring" OR "animal monitoring") AND ("explainable AI" OR XAI OR interpretab* OR explain* OR transparen* OR "model robustness" OR "uncertainty quantification" OR SHAP OR LIME OR Grad-CAM OR "trust*" OR "human-AI")
queries.arxiv_query: (livestock OR cattle OR cow OR pig OR poultry) AND (explainable OR interpretable OR XAI OR SHAP OR "Grad-CAM" OR robustness OR trust)
queries.openalex_query: precision livestock farming explainable AI interpretability robustness trust
queries.mdpi_query: livestock farming explainable AI interpretability XAI
queries.springer_query: (precision livestock farming OR smart farming OR livestock) AND ("explainable AI" OR XAI OR interpretab* OR "model robustness" OR trust)

criteria.include:
- Animals: cattle, swine, poultry, sheep, goats, or general livestock
- Focus: addresses ANY of: AI model interpretability, explainability, transparency, robustness, uncertainty quantification, trust, fairness, or human-AI interaction in livestock-related applications
- Study type: original primary research, evaluations, surveys, narrative reviews, systematic reviews, position papers — ALL are eligible (this is an emerging field)
- Methods of interest: SHAP, LIME, Grad-CAM, attention visualization, counterfactual explanations, robustness testing, adversarial evaluation, uncertainty estimation
- Year: 2015 or later
criteria.exclude:
- Studies on non-livestock animals (wildlife, pets, aquatic animals, insects) or on humans/medical applications
- Pure AI/ML methodology papers with NO livestock application
- Crop or aquaculture papers
- Publications prior to 2015
